page.title: Workflow
page.subtitle: Build a chain and generate an image
page.signInRequired: Sign in with studio access to open workflow.
page.accessDenied: Workflow requires the «Studio prompt & image generation» permission.
page.demoLimited: Demo mode: only the «Model swap» template is listed; other templates unlock after topping up credits or subscribing. Generations use free demo quota.
page.importReplaceConfirm: Replace current project «{{current}}» with graph from «{{imported}}»?

selfie.label: Selfie
selfie.description: Arm-extended selfie — front camera, overrides conflicting prompt hints

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.description: Extra directions (optional; scene may come from first frame)

textNote.label: Note
textNote.description: Canvas text block — hints, checklists (does not affect generation)

reference.label: Images ref
reference.description: Photo reference — you can connect several to one generation

imageGeneration.description: Prompt assembly and image generation (plain or via pipeline)

firstFrameGeneration.label: First frame
firstFrameGeneration.description: Still at t=0 for motion pipeline (plain or via pipeline)

turnaroundSheet.description: GPT Image 2.0 character sheet — face grid (except back view)

videoPromptCompose.label: Prompt from video
videoPromptCompose.description: Grok: detailed prompt from motion + BoardStory refs (outfit, environment, model)

scenarioOutfitChange.label: Scenario: outfit
scenarioOutfitChange.description: Photo base + outfit refs → pipeline → image generation

scenarioLocationChange.label: Scenario: location
scenarioLocationChange.description: Photo base / model + location refs → pipeline → image generation

scenarioFaceSwap.label: Scenario: model
scenarioFaceSwap.description: Scene ref + cabinet model or identity ref → person swap keeping pose

scenarioMotionVideo.label: Scenario: motion
scenarioMotionVideo.description: Motion + BoardStory → Grok prompt, audio and Seedance → pipeline → video

scenarioFirstFrame.label: Scenario: 1st frame
scenarioFirstFrame.description: Model + motion/refs → still t=0 → pipeline → First frame

videoGeneration.label: Video generation
videoGeneration.description: Video render: Seedance/Grok + duration. Scenario via pipeline-in.

videoUpscale.label: Video upscale
videoUpscale.description: Video Upscaler Pro — upscale finished clip (720p–4K)

preview.label: Preview
preview.description: View result. Connect ref description and pass image downstream as ref.

gen.scenarioInputsHint: Inputs connected via scenario — configure refs/prompt on the scenario node.
gen.noImageUrl: Job finished without an image URL
gen.promptOnlyHint: Prompt alone is enough — cabinet model and reference are optional. Multiple Images ref nodes allowed — each with its own role in Description.
gen.firstFrameHint: Like motion studio: video → Grok → WaveSpeed. Light film grain on frame (no face grid; optional frame to Reference).
gen.firstFrameScenarioHint: Inputs via First frame scenario — connect model/motion/refs to the scenario node.

model.hint: Studio model (optional) — skip for a brand-new character

prompt.placeholder: e.g. evening light, smile, casual outfit…

selfie.hint: Arm-extended selfie: front camera angle. Overrides conflicting prompt hints.

textNote.hint: Hints, checklist or any text — does not affect generation
textNote.placeholder:
e.g. 1) photo base — source pose
2) location ref — background only
3) Seedream for edit…

refDescription.hint: Role — reference purpose for Grok (multiple refs per generation allowed).
refDescription.descriptionPlaceholder: photo base: who/frame to edit; clothes: outfit donor — color, cut

reference.uploadHint: Upload a photo and set a role in Ref description on the left
reference.refNotFound: Reference not found on server — upload the file again
reference.fileFormats: PNG, JPG, WEBP · up to 25 MB

preview.connectDescAndRef: Connect Ref description on the left and ref → references
preview.connectOrWait: Connect a generation output or wait for the result

turnaroundSheet.hint: GPT Image 2.0 · character sheet 16:9 · white grid on all face views (not back) · outfit from first frame
turnaroundSheet.noImageUrl: Turnaround finished without an image URL

motionVideo.hint: Motion reference → @Video1 in Seedance. Without this node, motion is text-only in the prompt.

videoGen.noVideoUrl: Video generation finished without a URL
videoGen.scenarioHint: Scenario connected — configure prompt, motion and BoardStory refs on the scenario node.
videoGen.grokHint: Grok Imagine Video · first frame + prompt with motion description
videoGen.seedanceHint: BoardStory Seedance: identity @Image, motion/camera @Video. First frame optional.

videoUpscale.hint: WaveSpeed Video Upscaler Pro — upscale finished clip to 720p–4K
videoUpscale.connectVideoHint: Connect the video output from the Video node after rendering
videoUpscale.noVideoUrl: Upscale finished without a video URL

videoPromptCompose.sendVideoOnHint: Prompt with @Video1 — actor swap; motion from video ref, no text timeline.
videoPromptCompose.sendVideoOffHint: Video for analysis only — not sent to Seedance; Grok writes a detailed prompt with motion and [t s].
videoPromptCompose.hint: Grok parses motion video → prompt with @Image/@Video for BoardStory Seedance
videoPromptCompose.extractHint: Extract from motion — preview in this node (auto-picked up in Video)
videoPromptCompose.fixedPromptHint: No refs and no checkboxes: fixed prompt — identity from @Image1, outfit/room/motion from @Video1
videoPromptCompose.promptPlaceholder: Prompt appears after generation — you can edit manually
videoPromptCompose.promptPlaceholderShort: Prompt appears after generation — you can edit

scenarioMotionVideo.hint: Motion video scenario: Grok → prompt + BoardStory refs. Seedance settings here; render model in Video.

scenarioFirstFrame.hint: First frame scenario: model + motion video or refs → still at t=0 for motion pipeline. Connect to First frame via pipeline.

scenarioFaceSwap.hint: Without Model node: identity ref (who) + scene ref (pose/background). With cabinet model — scene ref is enough.

scenarioLocationChange.hint: Location change scenario: photo base (full person + pose/camera) + location refs → pipeline. Identity, hair, pose and angle — photo base only; do not connect Model. Location is background only.

scenarioOutfitChange.hint: Outfit change scenario: photo base + outfit refs → Image generation via pipeline. Identity and pose preserved; only outfit changes.

seedanceGuide.title: Seedance 2.0 — reference roles
seedanceGuide.video1Role: motion + camera only — not the actor's face from video
seedanceGuide.motionTip1: One person in frame, simple motion, up to ~15 sec.
seedanceGuide.motionTip2: No crowds, fights or complex choreography — Seedance handles those poorly.
seedanceGuide.motionTip3: Clear video: stable camera or readable tracking.
seedanceGuide.composeFoot: Grok writes a prompt with explicit MODEL REPLACEMENT: identity from @Image, motion and camera from @Video1.
seedanceGuide.videoFoot: Prompt must clearly separate: who is on screen (@Image) and where motion/camera come from (@Video).

export.noGraph: File has no workflow graph (nodes and edges)
